options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --cacheFolder
options.description: Specifies the folder to use to create temporary cache files.

options.name: --workspace
options.description: Specifies the workspace root folder. All .qs files inside this folder will be automatically compiled and the corresponding operations available for simulation.

options.name: --skipAutoLoadProject
options.description: Specifies whether to skip automatically loading the .csproj from the workspace's root folder.

commands.name: server
commands.description: Runs IQSharp as an HTTP server.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --cacheFolder
options.description: Specifies the folder to use to create temporary cache files.

options.name: --workspace
options.description: Specifies the workspace root folder. All .qs files inside this folder will be automatically compiled and the corresponding operations available for simulation.

options.name: --skipAutoLoadProject
options.description: Specifies whether to skip automatically loading the .csproj from the workspace's root folder.

commands.name: install
commands.description: Installs the Q# (iqsharp) kernel into Jupyter.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --develop
options.description: Installs a kernel spec that runs against this working directory. Useful for development only.

options.name: --user
options.description: Installs the kernel for the current user only.

options.name: --sys-prefix
options.description: Installs the kernel into the prefix given by Python's sys.prefix. Useful with conda env/venv.

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Level of logging messages to emit to the console. On development mode, defaults to Information.

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Prefix to use when installing the kernel into Jupyter. See `jupyter kernelspec install --help` for details.

options.name: --path-to-tool
options.description: Specifies an explicit path to the kernel tool being installed, rather than using the .NET command. This option is incompatible with --develop, and isn't typically needed except in CI builds or other automated environments.

options.name: --extra-install-arg
options.description: Specifies an extra argument to pass to Jupyter when installing this kernel.

options.name: --name
options.description: Specifies the name of the kernel to be installed; if not specified, defaults to iqsharp.

options.name: --user-agent-extra
options.description: Sets additional user agent information to be sent to the kernel.

commands.name: kernel
commands.description: Runs the Q# kernel. Typically only run by a Jupyter client.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Level of logging messages to emit to the console. Defaults to Error.Can also be set with the IQSHARP_LOG_LEVEL environment variable.

options.name: --user-agent-extra
options.description: Sets additional user agent information to be sent to the kernel.

options.name: --user-agent
options.description: Specifies which user agent has initiated this kernel instance.

options.name: --hosting-env
options.description: Specifies the hosting environment that this kernel is being run in.

options.name: --cacheFolder
options.description: Specifies the folder to use to create temporary cache files.

options.name: --workspace
options.description: Specifies the workspace root folder. All .qs files inside this folder will be automatically compiled and the corresponding operations available for simulation.

options.name: --skipAutoLoadProject
options.description: Specifies whether to skip automatically loading the .csproj from the workspace's root folder.

arguments.name: CONNECTION_FILE
arguments.description: Connection file used to connect to a Jupyter client.
